channel.title: Ml-Engineering on Steven Leung
channel.description: Recent content in Ml-Engineering on Steven Leung

item.title: Automated Detector Research Agent
item.description: Built a production agentic AI system for automated security detector research -- with advanced context engineering and orchestration.

item.title: Device Quarantine: 0-to-1 ML Security Feature
item.description: Led an ML-powered security feature from ideation through production -- building novel data labeling and high-precision adversarial detection.
